name: codex-flows-monorepo
description: Codex app-server clients, flow automation, workspace backend tools, and repo-native workspace operations.

scripts.build: vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router build && vp run --filter @workspace/ui build && vp run --filter codex-app-cli build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-discord-bridge build && vp run --filter codex-workspace-backend-local build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-workspace-voice-gateway build && vp run --filter codex-flow-runner build && vp run --filter web build && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs build
scripts.check:types: vp run --concurrency-limit 1 --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router --filter @workspace/ui --filter codex-app-cli --filter @peezy.tech/codex-discord-bridge --filter codex-workspace-backend-local --filter @peezy.tech/codex-workspace-voice-gateway --filter codex-flow-runner --filter web --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flow-docs check:types && vp run -w docs:check
scripts.test: vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows test && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime test && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex test && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-opencode-go-router test && vp run --filter codex-workspace-backend-local test && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-workspace-voice-gateway test && vp run --filter codex-flow-runner test && vp run --filter codex-app-cli test && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-discord-bridge test && vp run --filter web test
scripts.release:check: tsx scripts/check-publish-metadata.ts && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-flows release:check && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-discord-bridge release:check && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/codex-workspace-voice-gateway release:check && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-runtime release:check && vp run --filter @peezy.tech/flow-backend-convex release:check
